{{Infobox character
| name = Mister Goss
| aliases = Goss
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|the crew}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|ship's navigator}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Mister Goss, also known as Goss, served as a navigator on a ship. He was characterized by a gaunt, skeletal appearance and exhibited highly anxious behaviors, including nervous tics, high-pitched speech, and frequent checking of a pocketwatch. During an encounter with [[Elderspawn]], he was physically overwhelmed by creatures and later appeared bloodied and weakened while attempting to assist a companion named Lakiri. Following this event, he suffered from significant physical injuries that required bandaging, as well as profound emotional distress and rage. Despite his fragile state, he possessed a key crafted from dark bone. His [[life]] ended when he was discovered deceased in his sleeping quarters.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Mister Goss served as a navigator and crew member aboard the ship. During a battle, he was seen covered in blood while providing accounts concerning an explosion. His physical appearance was characterized by a skeletally thin frame that was wrapped in bandages. Ultimately, Mister Goss met his death.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Mister Goss]] is a ship's navigator.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Goss provided stories regarding the explosion.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Goss was covered in blood during the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Goss is a member of the crew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Mister Goss]] has a skeletally thin frame covered in bandages.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Mister Goss]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
